titleStmt.title: SII 23.484: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 484. (A.R. No. 484 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Ōṁkārēśvara temple—on the north and west walls of the Chaṇḍēśvara shrine Kulōttuṅga III: year 25: 1202-03 A.D.

summary.p: This also begins like some previous records with the same short preamble. The details of the date Mīna, śu. 5, Wednesday, Rōhiṇi, would give the equivalent A.D. 1203, March 19.
This records a gift of a mā and half of land as kāṇi and ūrkīḻ-iṟaiyili by the ūrār (assembly) of Aṉapāyapuram in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hara svastiśrī . puyalvāyttu maṇvaḷara Eṉṟa pāṭṭeḻuti tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭa ruḷiya śrīkulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5Āvatu miṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcami
yum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rocaṇi nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷa nāṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu Accaṉvākattu Iṭukiṟa Akaram Aṉapāya purattu Ūravarom kuṟṟālamuṭaiyār Arayaṉ Āḷuṭai nāyaṉārāṉa ceyatarap pallavaraiyan Innāṭṭuk kuṟṟālamuṭaiyār
brahmadecattu Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyārkku Ikkoyil Āticaṇṭe śvaradevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyumāka nāṅkaḷ nirvārttuk kuṭutta nilattukkup piramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricā vatu Ivvaṉapāyapurattu nilamāy nāṅkaḷ kuṭukkiṟa nila
ttukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai talaikaṇivāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai paṉaivāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mātirumaṅkalattu Ellaikkulaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirukkaḷiṟṟuppaṭi nampi nila ttukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunā
ṉkellai naṭuvupaṭṭa viḷainilam kuḻi 100- ṉāl nilam pa 4 Innilam Oru māvarai yum kāṇiyum Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyumāka viṭṭu Innilattukku Ūrmāvinta cilvari peruvari Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa Ūrile nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttu Antarāyam pāṭṭam kkaṭavomā
lomākil Icaivu tiṭṭe piramāṇamāvutākavum Ippaṭi sammadittu Innilam Oru māvaraiyum kāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyuñ ceytukuṭuttom Ivai var koyil Ādicaṇṭeśvaradevarkaṉmi kaḷukku Ivvaṉapāyapurattu Ūravarom Ivarkaḷ
Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr Ūrkkaṇakkuk kāvaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Oḷiyaṉ coṉṉavāṟṟivāṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirappiriyaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Itu ṉalūruṭai ṭaiyāṉ Irājakempiraveḷāṉ kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ippaṭikku Ivai peraruḷāṭa
tu Utaiyapālaṉum vātu cey vāraṇamaiyum kaimmāṭṭāṅkāṉa maikku Ippaṭikku Ivai Āṭavantāṉ poṉṉampala nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi ṟṟuppaṭi nampiyum celvi ñāṉacampantarum Ulaka pāla ṉum kai
Digital edition of SII 23.484 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
